'''Krai H'voc''' was a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] and mother of [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife]] and [[Bey]].<ref name="Gamer 1" />

==Biography==
Krai was one of many scouts for the Nagai sent from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] into wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], to which the Nagai called "Skyriver", in order to find a new home losing their own to the [[Tof/Legends|Tof]]. Instead of searching and observing the galaxy, Krai settled down on [[Corellia]], where she fell in love with a [[Bey's father|human male]] and gave birth to a child, [[Bey]]. When it was discovered by Nagai commanders that Krai was not doing her job, she was ordered to leave her family and continue her mission elsewhere. She left her family with little explanation. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="Forgotten">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}</ref> Krai suggested to the Nagai commanders that the invasion of the galaxy should wait until the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]] was over.<ref name="MC 100" />
